MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ADRIAN COVERT, GAWKER MEDIA LLC, GAWKER SALES LLC AND JOHN HERRMAN'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND MOTION UNDER CCP 425.16 TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Rachel Matteo-Boehm of Holme Roberts & Owen LLP (268.1996) for defendants and moving parties; Scott Redmond (510.868.2862) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Special Motion to Strike per Anti-SLAPP statute is granted. The Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is off calendar as moot. Ms. Matteo-Boehm to submit a proposed statement of decision. Attorney fees will be awarded. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Complaint; Points And Authorities In Support; Appendix Of Non California Authorities
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To May-31-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS GAWKER MEDIA, LLC, GAWKER SALES, LLC, JOHN HERRMAN AND ADRIAN COVERT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND MOTION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF SCOTT REDMOND.

APPEARANCES: Scott Redmond, 510/868-2862 pltf & opposing party in propria persona (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 05/31/11 at 9:30am for argument. Plaintiff to give notice. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
